basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Senior Project Engineer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIT Madras website. The last date to submit the application form is 17-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech with 2 years experience, M.E/M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics and related fields
qualification.details: B.E/B.Tech with 2 years Experience. M.E/M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics, and related fields. Essential: Mechanism & Kinematics Understanding (Gear systems, Linkages, Cam & follower, etc.); CAD & Prototyping Skills (SolidWorks/Fusion 360/Inventor). Desirable: Basic circuits, Microcontroller basics (Arduino), Sensors, 3D Printing experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 35,000 – Rs.45,000 per month (based on experience)

selection_process: Shortlisting Written Test/Skill Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Senior Project Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Senior Project Engineer position at IIT Madras is 17th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E/B.Tech degree with at least 2 years of experience, or an M.E/M.Tech degree in Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics, or related fields. Specific essential and desirable skills are also listed.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Project Engineer role will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 45,000 per month, depending on their experience and qualifications.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Project Engineer position announced by IIT Madras in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Madras Senior Project Engineer recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official IIT Madras website.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Senior Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Senior Project Engineer position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by a written test, skill test, or interview. Document verification will be the final step.

faq.question: Q8. What are the essential skills required for the Senior Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: Essential skills include a strong understanding of Mechanism & Kinematics (Gear systems, Linkages, Cam & follower, etc.) and proficiency in CAD & Prototyping tools like SolidWorks, Fusion 360, or Inventor.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Madras offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the direct links to the official notification PDF and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of IIT Madras is also provided.
